subject: [GLOBAL] Wrap gitlab CI commands exit status code
commit_message:
[GLOBAL] Wrap gitlab CI commands exit status code

- create a .ci/common.sh to dot that adds fancy colors and titles
- wrap with it most command exit code found in GitLab-CI

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: guillaume.lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: I64d1966f1cbaa6f50aa88bb9fe48f5408d334745

entries.message:
